title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Ratna Sagar Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Ratna Sagar Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Ratna Sagar Holdings Services. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Kochi-based team.

About Ratna Sagar Holdings Services:
Ratna Sagar Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Support students with special educational needs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ratna Sagar Holdings Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
